section: Schedule A - Assets and "unearned Income" (MS ARECO Schedule A 12.31.16 grid attachment)
free_text: Transposed grid attachment: each column is one asset; rows are checkbox buckets filled solid black. Row groups: EIF (blank for all columns); SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Value of Asset (A: None ... L: Over $50,000,000, Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000); Type of Income (None, Dividends, Rent, Interest, Capital Gains, Excepted/Blind Trust, Tax-Deferred, Other Type of Income); Amount of Income: Current Year (A: None ... K: Over $5,000,000, Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000); Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016 (same buckets). Footer: MS ARECO Schedule A 12.31.16. Name: Rohit Khanna. Page ___ of ___ blank.
